input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.4.1
            TITLE: bolted connections in the primary structure must use a removable bolt and nut.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.4.1: Bolted connections in the Primary Structure must use a removable bolt and nut.
F.5.4.1 Bolted connections in the Primary Structure must use a removable bolt and nut.   
Bonded fasteners and blind nuts and bolts do not meet this requirement

final_answer: rule F.5.4.1: Bolted connections in the Primary Structure must use a removable bolt and nut. F.5.4.1 Bolted connections in the Primary Structure must use a removable bolt and nut. Bonded fasteners and blind nuts and bolts do not meet this requirement
